result.markdown:
---
title: "Common Deep Learning Architecture Patterns"
author: "Andreas Bogossian"
date: "2026-03-17"
---

## Foundational Architectures

### Feedforward Neural Network (FNN)

The classic fully-connected MLP; layers of neurons with activations. Foundation for most other architectures.

::: {#90c6ae55 .cell execution_count=1}

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display}
```{=html}
<script type="ojs-define">{"contents": [{"name": "fnn_spec", "value": {"nodes": [{"id": "x", "label": "x", "type": "io"}, {"id": "i1", "label": "age", "type": "input"}, {"id": "i2", "label": "income", "type": "input"}, {"id": "i3", "label": "score", "type": "input"}, {"id": "h1", "label": "h1", "type": "hidden"}, {"id": "h2", "label": "h2", "type": "hidden"}, {"id": "h3", "label": "h3", "type": "hidden"}, {"id": "h4", "label": "h4", "type": "hidden"}, {"id": "o1", "label": "cat A", "type": "output"}, {"id": "o2", "label": "cat B", "type": "output"}, {"id": "yh", "label": "\u0177", "type": "io"}], "groups": [{"id": "inp", "label": "Input \u00b7 none", "nodes": ["i1", "i2", "i3"]}, {"id": "hid", "label": "Hidden \u00b7 ReLU", "nodes": ["h1", "h2", "h3", "h4"]}, {"id": "out", "label": "Output \u00b7 Softmax", "nodes": ["o1", "o2"]}], "edges": [{"from": "x", "to": "i1"}, {"from": "x", "to": "i2"}, {"from": "x", "to": "i3"}, {"from": "i1", "to": "h1"}, {"from": "i1", "to": "h2"}, {"from": "i1", "to": "h3"}, {"from": "i1", "to": "h4"}, {"from": "i2", "to": "h1"}, {"from": "i2", "to": "h2"}, {"from": "i2", "to": "h3"}, {"from": "i2", "to": "h4"}, {"from": "i3", "to": "h1"}, {"from": "i3", "to": "h2"}, {"from": "i3", "to": "h3"}, {"from": "i3", "to": "h4"}, {"from": "h1", "to": "o1"}, {"from": "h1", "to": "o2"}, {"from": "h2", "to": "o1"}, {"from": "h2", "to": "o2"}, {"from": "h3", "to": "o1"}, {"from": "h3", "to": "o2"}, {"from": "h4", "to": "o1"}, {"from": "h4", "to": "o2"}, {"from": "o1", "to": "yh"}, {"from": "o2", "to": "yh"}]}}]}</script>
```
:::
:::


```{ojs}
//| echo: false
fnn_d3 = require("d3@7")

fnn_COLORS = ({
  io:     { fill: '#1e1e1c', stroke: '#666460', text: '#a8a69e' },
  input:  { fill: '#062b22', stroke: '#1d9e75', text: '#5dcaa5' },
  hidden: { fill: '#061e38', stroke: '#378add', text: '#85b7eb' },
  output: { fill: '#2d1a02', stroke: '#ba7517', text: '#ef9f27' },
})

fnn_diagram = {
  const W        = 720
  const nodeR    = 28
  const padX     = 56
  const rowGap   = 68
  const bracketPad = 18

  const nodeMap = {}
  fnn_spec.nodes.forEach(n => nodeMap[n.id] = { ...n })

  const groupNodes = new Set(fnn_spec.groups.flatMap(g => g.nodes))
  const allTargets = new Set(fnn_spec.edges.map(e => e.to))
  const ioNodes    = fnn_spec.nodes.filter(n => !groupNodes.has(n.id))
  const leadingIo  = ioNodes.filter(n => !allTargets.has(n.id)).map(n => n.id)
  const trailingIo = ioNodes.filter(n =>  allTargets.has(n.id)).map(n => n.id)

  const colAssign = {}
  leadingIo.forEach(id => colAssign[id] = 0)
  fnn_spec.groups.forEach((g, i) => g.nodes.forEach(id => colAssign[id] = i + 1))
  trailingIo.forEach(id => colAssign[id] = fnn_spec.groups.length + 1)

  const colCounts = {}, colIdx = {}
  fnn_spec.nodes.forEach(n => {
    const c = colAssign[n.id] ?? 0
    colCounts[c] = (colCounts[c] || 0) + 1
  })
  fnn_spec.nodes.forEach(n => {
    const c = colAssign[n.id] ?? 0
    colIdx[c] = colIdx[c] || 0
    nodeMap[n.id]._col = c
    nodeMap[n.id]._row = colIdx[c]++
  })

  const numCols = fnn_spec.groups.length + 2
  const colW    = (W - padX * 2) / numCols
  const colX    = i => padX + i * colW + colW / 2
  const maxRows = Math.max(...Object.values(colCounts))
  const H       = maxRows * rowGap + 120
  const nodeY   = n => {
    const c = n._col, total = colCounts[c] || 1
    return (H - (total - 1) * rowGap) / 2 + n._row * rowGap
  }

  const svg = fnn_d3.create("svg")
    .attr("width", "100%")
    .attr("viewBox", `0 0 ${W} ${H}`)
    .style("overflow", "visible")

  svg.append("defs").append("marker")
    .attr("id", "fnn_arr")
    .attr("viewBox", "0 0 10 10").attr("refX", 8).attr("refY", 5)
    .attr("markerWidth", 7).attr("markerHeight", 7)
    .attr("orient", "auto-start-reverse")
    .append("path")
    .attr("d", "M2 1L8 5L2 9")
    .attr("fill", "none").attr("stroke", "#666")
    .attr("stroke-width", "1.5")
    .attr("stroke-linecap", "round").attr("stroke-linejoin", "round")

  fnn_spec.groups.forEach((g, gi) => {
    const col    = gi + 1
    const gNodes = g.nodes.map(id => nodeMap[id]).filter(Boolean)
    if (!gNodes.length) return
    const ys   = gNodes.map(nodeY)
    const x    = colX(col)
    const minY = Math.min(...ys)
    const maxY = Math.max(...ys)
    const bx   = x - nodeR - bracketPad
    const bw   = (nodeR + bracketPad) * 2
    const by   = minY - nodeR - bracketPad
    const bh   = maxY - minY + (nodeR + bracketPad) * 2

    svg.append("rect")
      .attr("x", bx).attr("y", by)
      .attr("width", bw).attr("height", bh)
      .attr("rx", 12)
      .attr("fill", "#ffffff06")
      .attr("stroke", "#444440")
      .attr("stroke-width", "0.8")
      .attr("stroke-dasharray", "5 3")

    svg.append("text")
      .attr("x", x).attr("y", by - 10)
      .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
      .attr("font-size", "12px")
      .attr("font-family", "monospace")
      .attr("fill", "#666460")
      .text(g.label)
  })

  fnn_spec.edges.forEach(e => {
    const s = nodeMap[e.from], t = nodeMap[e.to]
    if (!s || !t) return
    const sx = colX(s._col), sy = nodeY(s)
    const tx = colX(t._col), ty = nodeY(t)
    const dx = tx - sx

    svg.append("path")
      .attr("d", `M${sx + nodeR} ${sy} C${sx + dx * 0.5} ${sy},${tx - dx * 0.5} ${ty},${tx - nodeR} ${ty}`)
      .attr("fill", "none")
      .attr("stroke", "#3a3a38")
      .attr("stroke-width", "1.2")
      .attr("opacity", "0.9")
      .attr("marker-end", "url(#fnn_arr)")
  })

  fnn_spec.nodes.forEach(n => {
    const nd  = nodeMap[n.id]
    const cx  = colX(nd._col)
    const cy  = nodeY(nd)
    const pal = fnn_COLORS[n.type] || fnn_COLORS.hidden
    const g   = fnn_d3.select(svg.node()).append("g").style("cursor", "default")

    g.append("circle")
      .attr("cx", cx).attr("cy", cy).attr("r", nodeR + 3)
      .attr("fill", "none")
      .attr("stroke", pal.stroke)
      .attr("stroke-width", "0.5")
      .attr("opacity", "0.25")

    g.append("circle")
      .attr("cx", cx).attr("cy", cy).attr("r", nodeR)
      .attr("fill", pal.fill)
      .attr("stroke", pal.stroke)
      .attr("stroke-width", "1.2")

    g.append("text")
      .attr("x", cx).attr("y", cy)
      .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
      .attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
      .attr("font-size", "12px")
      .attr("font-weight", "500")
      .attr("font-family", "monospace")
      .attr("fill", pal.text)
      .text(n.label.length > 6 ? n.label.slice(0, 6) + "…" : n.label)
  })

  return svg.node()
}
```


### Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)

Uses convolutional filters to exploit spatial locality; dominant in image tasks (ResNet, EfficientNet, VGG).

::: {#214768e9 .cell execution_count=2}

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display}
```{=html}
<script type="ojs-define">{"contents": [{"name": "spec", "value": {"nodes": [{"id": "inp", "label": "Input", "sub": "32\u00d732\u00d71", "detail": "grayscale image", "type": "io"}, {"id": "c1", "label": "Conv1", "sub": "5\u00d75, s1, 6ch", "detail": "156 params \u00b7 ReLU", "type": "conv"}, {"id": "p1", "label": "Pool1", "sub": "2\u00d72, s2", "detail": "max pool \u2192 14\u00d714\u00d76", "type": "pool"}, {"id": "c2", "label": "Conv2", "sub": "5\u00d75, s1, 16ch", "detail": "2,416 params \u00b7 ReLU", "type": "conv"}, {"id": "p2", "label": "Pool2", "sub": "2\u00d72, s2", "detail": "max pool \u2192 5\u00d75\u00d716", "type": "pool"}, {"id": "fl", "label": "Flatten", "sub": "400", "detail": "5\u00d75\u00d716 \u2192 400", "type": "flatten"}, {"id": "fc1", "label": "FC1", "sub": "400\u2192120", "detail": "48,120 params \u00b7 ReLU", "type": "fc"}, {"id": "fc2", "label": "FC2", "sub": "120\u219284", "detail": "10,164 params \u00b7 ReLU", "type": "fc"}, {"id": "out", "label": "Output", "sub": "84\u219210", "detail": "850 params \u00b7 Softmax", "type": "io"}], "edges": [{"from": "inp", "to": "c1"}, {"from": "c1", "to": "p1"}, {"from": "p1", "to": "c2"}, {"from": "c2", "to": "p2"}, {"from": "p2", "to": "fl"}, {"from": "fl", "to": "fc1"}, {"from": "fc1", "to": "fc2"}, {"from": "fc2", "to": "out"}]}}]}</script>
```
:::
:::


```{ojs}
//| echo: false
d3 = require("d3@7")

COLORS = ({
  io:      { fill: '#1e1e1c', stroke: '#666460', text: '#a8a69e', sub: '#666460', detail: '#555450' },
  conv:    { fill: '#061e38', stroke: '#378add', text: '#85b7eb', sub: '#378add', detail: '#2a5a8a' },
  pool:    { fill: '#062b22', stroke: '#1d9e75', text: '#5dcaa5', sub: '#1d9e75', detail: '#0d5c3e' },
  flatten: { fill: '#2a1f02', stroke: '#ba7517', text: '#ef9f27', sub: '#ba7517', detail: '#7a4d0a' },
  fc:      { fill: '#1e0a2a', stroke: '#7f77dd', text: '#afa9ec', sub: '#7f77dd', detail: '#4a4490' },
})

diagram = {
  const W      = 720
  const nodeW  = 72
  const nodeH  = 72
  const gapX   = 28
  const midY   = 100
  const n      = spec.nodes.length
  const totalW = n * nodeW + (n - 1) * gapX
  const startX = (W - totalW) / 2
  const H      = midY * 2 + nodeH / 2 + 48
  const cx     = i => startX + i * (nodeW + gapX) + nodeW / 2

  const svg = d3.create("svg")
    .attr("width", "100%")
    .attr("viewBox", `0 0 ${W} ${H}`)
    .style("overflow", "visible")

  svg.append("defs").append("marker")
    .attr("id", "arr")
    .attr("viewBox", "0 0 10 10").attr("refX", 8).attr("refY", 5)
    .attr("markerWidth", 7).attr("markerHeight", 7)
    .attr("orient", "auto-start-reverse")
    .append("path")
    .attr("d", "M2 1L8 5L2 9")
    .attr("fill", "none").attr("stroke", "#555")
    .attr("stroke-width", "1.5")
    .attr("stroke-linecap", "round").attr("stroke-linejoin", "round")

  const nodeMap = {}
  spec.nodes.forEach((n, i) => nodeMap[n.id] = { ...n, _i: i })

  // edges
  spec.edges.forEach(e => {
    const s = nodeMap[e.from], t = nodeMap[e.to]
    if (!s || !t) return
    svg.append("line")
      .attr("x1", cx(s._i) + nodeW / 2)
      .attr("y1", midY)
      .attr("x2", cx(t._i) - nodeW / 2 - 4)
      .attr("y2", midY)
      .attr("stroke", "#3a3a38")
      .attr("stroke-width", "1.2")
      .attr("marker-end", "url(#arr)")
  })

  // nodes
  spec.nodes.forEach((n, i) => {
    const x   = cx(i) - nodeW / 2
    const y   = midY - nodeH / 2
    const pal = COLORS[n.type] || COLORS.fc
    const g   = svg.append("g")

    // glow ring
    g.append("rect")
      .attr("x", x - 2).attr("y", y - 2)
      .attr("width", nodeW + 4).attr("height", nodeH + 4)
      .attr("rx", 10)
      .attr("fill", "none")
      .attr("stroke", pal.stroke)
      .attr("stroke-width", "0.5")
      .attr("opacity", "0.2")

    // main block
    g.append("rect")
      .attr("x", x).attr("y", y)
      .attr("width", nodeW).attr("height", nodeH)
      .attr("rx", 8)
      .attr("fill", pal.fill)
      .attr("stroke", pal.stroke)
      .attr("stroke-width", "1.2")

    // divider between sub and detail
    g.append("line")
      .attr("x1", x + 6).attr("y1", midY + 6)
      .attr("x2", x + nodeW - 6).attr("y2", midY + 6)
      .attr("stroke", pal.stroke)
      .attr("stroke-width", "0.4")
      .attr("opacity", "0.3")

    // layer name
    g.append("text")
      .attr("x", cx(i)).attr("y", midY - 22)
      .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
      .attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
      .attr("font-size", "12px")
      .attr("font-weight", "600")
      .attr("font-family", "monospace")
      .attr("fill", pal.text)
      .text(n.label)

    // sub — kernel/shape info
    g.append("text")
      .attr("x", cx(i)).attr("y", midY - 6)
      .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
      .attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
      .attr("font-size", "9.5px")
      .attr("font-family", "monospace")
      .attr("fill", pal.sub)
      .text(n.sub)

    // detail — params + activation
    g.append("text")
      .attr("x", cx(i)).attr("y", midY + 16)
      .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
      .attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
      .attr("font-size", "9px")
      .attr("font-family", "monospace")
      .attr("fill", pal.detail)
      .text(n.detail)
  })

  // total param count
  const totalParams = 156 + 2416 + 48120 + 10164 + 850
  svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", W / 2).attr("y", H - 20)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("font-size", "11px")
    .attr("font-family", "monospace")
    .attr("fill", "#555450")
    .text(`Total trainable parameters: ${totalParams.toLocaleString()}`)

  // legend
  const legendTypes = [
    { type: "conv",    label: "Conv" },
    { type: "pool",    label: "Pooling" },
    { type: "flatten", label: "Flatten" },
    { type: "fc",      label: "Fully connected" },
  ]
  const legendY      = H - 4
  const legendStartX = (W - legendTypes.length * 130) / 2

  legendTypes.forEach((lt, i) => {
    const pal = COLORS[lt.type]
    const lx  = legendStartX + i * 130
    svg.append("rect")
      .attr("x", lx).attr("y", legendY - 7)
      .attr("width", 12).attr("height", 12)
      .attr("rx", 3)
      .attr("fill", pal.fill)
      .attr("stroke", pal.stroke)
      .attr("stroke-width", "1")
    svg.append("text")
      .attr("x", lx + 18).attr("y", legendY)
      .attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
      .attr("font-size", "11px")
      .attr("font-family", "monospace")
      .attr("fill", "#666460")
      .text(lt.label)
  })

  return svg.node()
}
```


### Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) / LSTM / GRU

Processes sequential data with hidden state; suited for time series and language before Transformers took over.

::: {#bc86f429 .cell execution_count=3}

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display}
```{=html}
<script type="ojs-define">{"contents": [{"name": "rnn_spec", "value": {"sequence": ["x\u2080", "x\u2081", "x\u2082", "x\u2083"], "hidden_size": 64, "output_size": 4, "activation": "tanh", "cell": {"inputs": ["x\u209c", "h\u209c\u208b\u2081"], "gates": ["linear", "tanh"], "outputs": ["h\u209c", "y\u209c"], "equation": "h\u209c = tanh(W\u2093x\u209c + W\u2095h\u209c\u208b\u2081 + b)"}}}]}</script>
```
:::
:::


```{ojs}
//| echo: false
rnn_d3 = require("d3@7")

rnn_COLORS = ({
  io:     { fill: '#1e1e1c', stroke: '#666460', text: '#a8a69e' },
  cell:   { fill: '#061e38', stroke: '#378add', text: '#85b7eb' },
  hidden: { fill: '#062b22', stroke: '#1d9e75', text: '#5dcaa5' },
  output: { fill: '#2d1a02', stroke: '#ba7517', text: '#ef9f27' },
  gate:   { fill: '#1e0a2a', stroke: '#7f77dd', text: '#afa9ec' },
})

rnn_diagram = {
  const W     = 720
  const H     = 560
  const steps = rnn_spec.sequence.length

  const svg = rnn_d3.create("svg")
    .attr("width", "100%")
    .attr("viewBox", `0 0 ${W} ${H}`)
    .style("overflow", "visible")

  // ── arrow marker ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  svg.append("defs").append("marker")
    .attr("id", "rnn_arr")
    .attr("viewBox", "0 0 10 10").attr("refX", 8).attr("refY", 5)
    .attr("markerWidth", 7).attr("markerHeight", 7)
    .attr("orient", "auto-start-reverse")
    .append("path").attr("d", "M2 1L8 5L2 9")
    .attr("fill", "none").attr("stroke", "#555")
    .attr("stroke-width", "1.5")
    .attr("stroke-linecap", "round").attr("stroke-linejoin", "round")

  // ── section labels ────────────────────────────────────────────
  svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", W / 2).attr("y", 18)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("font-size", "11px").attr("font-family", "monospace")
    .attr("fill", "#555450")
    .text("unrolled through time")

  svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", W / 2).attr("y", 306)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("font-size", "11px").attr("font-family", "monospace")
    .attr("fill", "#555450")
    .text("cell internals")

  // ── divider ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  svg.append("line")
    .attr("x1", 40).attr("y1", 318)
    .attr("x2", W - 40).attr("y2", 318)
    .attr("stroke", "#333330")
    .attr("stroke-width", "0.5")
    .attr("stroke-dasharray", "4 4")

  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // SECTION 1 — UNROLLED VIEW
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  const cellW   = 72
  const cellH   = 44
  const cellGap = 56
  const unrollY = 140   // vertical center of unrolled cells
  const totalCellW = steps * cellW + (steps - 1) * cellGap
  const cellStartX = (W - totalCellW) / 2

  const cellCX = i => cellStartX + i * (cellW + cellGap) + cellW / 2

  // h₀ initial state label
  const h0x = cellStartX - cellGap - 10
  svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", h0x).attr("y", unrollY)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
    .attr("font-size", "12px").attr("font-family", "monospace")
    .attr("fill", "#1d9e75")
    .text("h₀")

  // arrow from h0 into first cell
  svg.append("line")
    .attr("x1", h0x + 14).attr("y1", unrollY)
    .attr("x2", cellStartX - 4).attr("y2", unrollY)
    .attr("stroke", "#1d9e75").attr("stroke-width", "1")
    .attr("opacity", "0.6")
    .attr("marker-end", "url(#rnn_arr)")

  rnn_spec.sequence.forEach((token, i) => {
    const cx = cellCX(i)
    const x  = cx - cellW / 2
    const y  = unrollY - cellH / 2
    const pal = rnn_COLORS.cell

    // glow
    svg.append("rect")
      .attr("x", x - 2).attr("y", y - 2)
      .attr("width", cellW + 4).attr("height", cellH + 4)
      .attr("rx", 10).attr("fill", "none")
      .attr("stroke", pal.stroke).attr("stroke-width", "0.5")
      .attr("opacity", "0.2")

    // cell block
    svg.append("rect")
      .attr("x", x).attr("y", y)
      .attr("width", cellW).attr("height", cellH)
      .attr("rx", 8)
      .attr("fill", pal.fill)
      .attr("stroke", pal.stroke)
      .attr("stroke-width", "1.2")

    // RNN label
    svg.append("text")
      .attr("x", cx).attr("y", unrollY - 6)
      .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
      .attr("font-size", "12px").attr("font-weight", "600")
      .attr("font-family", "monospace").attr("fill", pal.text)
      .text("RNN")

    // time step label
    svg.append("text")
      .attr("x", cx).attr("y", unrollY + 10)
      .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
      .attr("font-size", "10px").attr("font-family", "monospace")
      .attr("fill", "#378add").attr("opacity", "0.7")
      .text(`t=${i}`)

    // input arrow from xᵢ below
    const inputY = unrollY + cellH / 2 + 52
    svg.append("line")
      .attr("x1", cx).attr("y1", inputY - 16)
      .attr("x2", cx).attr("y2", unrollY + cellH / 2 + 4)
      .attr("stroke", "#3a3a38").attr("stroke-width", "1")
      .attr("marker-end", "url(#rnn_arr)")

    // input token label
    svg.append("text")
      .attr("x", cx).attr("y", inputY)
      .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
      .attr("font-size", "13px").attr("font-family", "monospace")
      .attr("fill", "#a8a69e")
      .text(token)

    // output arrow upward to yᵢ
    const outputY = unrollY - cellH / 2 - 52
    svg.append("line")
      .attr("x1", cx).attr("y1", unrollY - cellH / 2 - 4)
      .attr("x2", cx).attr("y2", outputY + 16)
      .attr("stroke", "#ba7517").attr("stroke-width", "1")
      .attr("opacity", "0.7")
      .attr("marker-end", "url(#rnn_arr)")

    // output label yᵢ
    svg.append("text")
      .attr("x", cx).attr("y", outputY)
      .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
      .attr("font-size", "13px").attr("font-family", "monospace")
      .attr("fill", "#ef9f27")
      .text(`y${["₀","₁","₂","₃"][i]}`)

    // hidden state arrow to next cell
    if (i < steps - 1) {
      const nextCX = cellCX(i + 1)
      svg.append("line")
        .attr("x1", cx + cellW / 2 + 2).attr("y1", unrollY)
        .attr("x2", nextCX - cellW / 2 - 4).attr("y2", unrollY)
        .attr("stroke", "#1d9e75").attr("stroke-width", "1.2")
        .attr("opacity", "0.8")
        .attr("marker-end", "url(#rnn_arr)")

      // hₜ label on arrow
      svg.append("text")
        .attr("x", (cx + cellW / 2 + nextCX - cellW / 2) / 2)
        .attr("y", unrollY - 10)
        .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
        .attr("font-size", "10px").attr("font-family", "monospace")
        .attr("fill", "#1d9e75").attr("opacity", "0.8")
        .text(`h${["₁","₂","₃"][i]}`)
    }
  })

  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // SECTION 2 — CELL INTERNALS
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  const detailY  = 430   // vertical center of detail diagram
  const detailCX = W / 2

  // inputs on the left
  const inputLabels = ["xₜ", "hₜ₋₁"]
  inputLabels.forEach((lbl, i) => {
    const iy = detailY - 20 + i * 40
    const pal = i === 0 ? rnn_COLORS.io : rnn_COLORS.hidden
    svg.append("text")
      .attr("x", 80).attr("y", iy)
      .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
      .attr("font-size", "13px").attr("font-family", "monospace")
      .attr("fill", pal.text)
      .text(lbl)
    svg.append("line")
      .attr("x1", 100).attr("y1", iy)
      .attr("x2", 198).attr("y2", iy)
      .attr("stroke", "#3a3a38").attr("stroke-width", "1")
      .attr("marker-end", "url(#rnn_arr)")
  })

  // linear transform block
  const linX = 200, linY = detailY - 30, linW = 80, linH = 60
  svg.append("rect")
    .attr("x", linX).attr("y", linY)
    .attr("width", linW).attr("height", linH)
    .attr("rx", 8)
    .attr("fill", rnn_COLORS.gate.fill)
    .attr("stroke", rnn_COLORS.gate.stroke)
    .attr("stroke-width", "1.2")
  svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", linX + linW / 2).attr("y", detailY - 8)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
    .attr("font-size", "11px").attr("font-weight", "600")
    .attr("font-family", "monospace").attr("fill", rnn_COLORS.gate.text)
    .text("linear")
  svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", linX + linW / 2).attr("y", detailY + 10)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
    .attr("font-size", "10px").attr("font-family", "monospace")
    .attr("fill", rnn_COLORS.gate.text).attr("opacity", "0.7")
    .text("Wx + Wh + b")

  // arrow linear → tanh
  svg.append("line")
    .attr("x1", linX + linW + 2).attr("y1", detailY)
    .attr("x2", 346).attr("y2", detailY)
    .attr("stroke", "#3a3a38").attr("stroke-width", "1")
    .attr("marker-end", "url(#rnn_arr)")

  // tanh block
  const tanhX = 348, tanhY = detailY - 30, tanhW = 72, tanhH = 60
  svg.append("rect")
    .attr("x", tanhX).attr("y", tanhY)
    .attr("width", tanhW).attr("height", tanhH)
    .attr("rx", 8)
    .attr("fill", rnn_COLORS.cell.fill)
    .attr("stroke", rnn_COLORS.cell.stroke)
    .attr("stroke-width", "1.2")
  svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", tanhX + tanhW / 2).attr("y", detailY - 6)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
    .attr("font-size", "13px").attr("font-weight", "600")
    .attr("font-family", "monospace").attr("fill", rnn_COLORS.cell.text)
    .text("tanh")
  svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", tanhX + tanhW / 2).attr("y", detailY + 12)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
    .attr("font-size", "10px").attr("font-family", "monospace")
    .attr("fill", rnn_COLORS.cell.text).attr("opacity", "0.7")
    .text("[-1, 1]")

  // arrow tanh → split point
  svg.append("line")
    .attr("x1", tanhX + tanhW + 2).attr("y1", detailY)
    .attr("x2", 480).attr("y2", detailY)
    .attr("stroke", "#3a3a38").attr("stroke-width", "1")
    .attr("marker-end", "url(#rnn_arr)")

  // hₜ output (up)
  svg.append("line")
    .attr("x1", 490).attr("y1", detailY - 2)
    .attr("x2", 570).attr("y2", detailY - 40)
    .attr("stroke", "#1d9e75").attr("stroke-width", "1.2")
    .attr("opacity", "0.8")
    .attr("marker-end", "url(#rnn_arr)")
  svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", 588).attr("y", detailY - 42)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
    .attr("font-size", "13px").attr("font-family", "monospace")
    .attr("fill", "#1d9e75")
    .text("hₜ")

  // yₜ output (down)
  svg.append("line")
    .attr("x1", 490).attr("y1", detailY + 2)
    .attr("x2", 570).attr("y2", detailY + 40)
    .attr("stroke", "#ba7517").attr("stroke-width", "1.2")
    .attr("opacity", "0.8")
    .attr("marker-end", "url(#rnn_arr)")
  svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", 588).attr("y", detailY + 42)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
    .attr("font-size", "13px").attr("font-family", "monospace")
    .attr("fill", "#ef9f27")
    .text("yₜ")

  // equation label
  svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", W / 2).attr("y", H - 10)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("font-size", "11px").attr("font-family", "monospace")
    .attr("fill", "#555450")
    .text(rnn_spec.cell.equation)

  return svg.node()
}
```


## Attention & Transformer-Based

### Transformer

Self-attention mechanism that models global dependencies; backbone of modern NLP and increasingly vision (BERT, GPT, T5, ViT).

::: {#0412924e .cell execution_count=4}

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display}
```{=html}
<script type="ojs-define">{"contents": [{"name": "transformer_spec", "value": {"model": {"d_model": 512, "n_heads": 8, "d_ff": 2048, "n_layers": 6, "d_k": 64, "dropout": 0.1, "vocab_size": 37000}, "encoder_blocks": [{"id": "enc_embed", "label": "Input embedding", "sub": "37k \u00d7 512", "detail": "token + positional", "type": "embed"}, {"id": "enc_mha", "label": "Multi-head attention", "sub": "8 heads \u00d7 64d", "detail": "Q\u00b7K\u1d40/\u221a64 \u2192 softmax", "type": "attn"}, {"id": "enc_add1", "label": "Add & norm", "sub": "residual + LN", "detail": "x + sublayer(x)", "type": "norm"}, {"id": "enc_ffn", "label": "Feed forward", "sub": "512\u21922048\u2192512", "detail": "ReLU \u00b7 2 FC layers", "type": "ffn"}, {"id": "enc_add2", "label": "Add & norm", "sub": "residual + LN", "detail": "x + sublayer(x)", "type": "norm"}], "decoder_blocks": [{"id": "dec_embed", "label": "Output embedding", "sub": "37k \u00d7 512", "detail": "token + positional", "type": "embed"}, {"id": "dec_mmha", "label": "Masked MH attention", "sub": "8 heads \u00d7 64d", "detail": "causal mask applied", "type": "attn"}, {"id": "dec_add1", "label": "Add & norm", "sub": "residual + LN", "detail": "x + sublayer(x)", "type": "norm"}, {"id": "dec_cmha", "label": "Cross attention", "sub": "K,V from encoder", "detail": "Q from decoder", "type": "cross"}, {"id": "dec_add2", "label": "Add & norm", "sub": "residual + LN", "detail": "x + sublayer(x)", "type": "norm"}, {"id": "dec_ffn", "label": "Feed forward", "sub": "512\u21922048\u2192512", "detail": "ReLU \u00b7 2 FC layers", "type": "ffn"}, {"id": "dec_add3", "label": "Add & norm", "sub": "residual + LN", "detail": "x + sublayer(x)", "type": "norm"}, {"id": "dec_out", "label": "Linear + Softmax", "sub": "512\u219237k", "detail": "output probabilities", "type": "output"}], "attention": {"equation": "Attention(Q,K,V) = softmax(QK\u1d40 / \u221ad\u2096) \u00b7 V", "steps": [{"id": "at_qkv", "label": "Q, K, V", "sub": "linear projections", "type": "attn"}, {"id": "at_dot", "label": "QK\u1d40 / \u221ad\u2096", "sub": "scaled dot product", "type": "ffn"}, {"id": "at_soft", "label": "softmax", "sub": "attention weights", "type": "norm"}, {"id": "at_wv", "label": "\u00b7 V", "sub": "weighted sum", "type": "cross"}, {"id": "at_out", "label": "concat", "sub": "8 heads \u2192 512d", "type": "embed"}]}}}]}</script>
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
transformer_d3 = require("d3@7")

transformer_COLORS = ({
  embed:  { fill: '#1e1e1c', stroke: '#666460', text: '#a8a69e', sub: '#666460', detail: '#555450' },
  attn:   { fill: '#061e38', stroke: '#378add', text: '#85b7eb', sub: '#378add', detail: '#2a5a8a' },
  norm:   { fill: '#062b22', stroke: '#1d9e75', text: '#5dcaa5', sub: '#1d9e75', detail: '#0d5c3e' },
  ffn:    { fill: '#2a1f02', stroke: '#ba7517', text: '#ef9f27', sub: '#ba7517', detail: '#7a4d0a' },
  cross:  { fill: '#1e0a2a', stroke: '#7f77dd', text: '#afa9ec', sub: '#7f77dd', detail: '#4a4490' },
  output: { fill: '#2a0a0a', stroke: '#e24b4a', text: '#f09595', sub: '#e24b4a', detail: '#7a1f1f' },
})

transformer_diagram = {
  const W        = 720
  const H        = 880
  const nodeW    = 148
  const nodeH    = 62
  const gapY     = 10
  const encX     = 110
  const decX     = 430
  const startY   = 40

  const svg = transformer_d3.create("svg")
    .attr("width", "100%")
    .attr("viewBox", `0 0 ${W} ${H}`)
    .style("overflow", "visible")

  // ── arrow marker ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  svg.append("defs").append("marker")
    .attr("id", "tr_arr")
    .attr("viewBox", "0 0 10 10").attr("refX", 8).attr("refY", 5)
    .attr("markerWidth", 7).attr("markerHeight", 7)
    .attr("orient", "auto-start-reverse")
    .append("path").attr("d", "M2 1L8 5L2 9")
    .attr("fill", "none").attr("stroke", "#555")
    .attr("stroke-width", "1.5")
    .attr("stroke-linecap", "round").attr("stroke-linejoin", "round")

  // ── helper: draw a block ──────────────────────────────────────
  const drawBlock = (cx, cy, node) => {
    const pal = transformer_COLORS[node.type] || transformer_COLORS.ffn
    const x   = cx - nodeW / 2
    const y   = cy - nodeH / 2
    const g   = svg.append("g")

    // glow
    g.append("rect")
      .attr("x", x - 2).attr("y", y - 2)
      .attr("width", nodeW + 4).attr("height", nodeH + 4)
      .attr("rx", 10).attr("fill", "none")
      .attr("stroke", pal.stroke).attr("stroke-width", "0.5")
      .attr("opacity", "0.2")

    // block
    g.append("rect")
      .attr("x", x).attr("y", y)
      .attr("width", nodeW).attr("height", nodeH)
      .attr("rx", 8).attr("fill", pal.fill)
      .attr("stroke", pal.stroke).attr("stroke-width", "1.2")

    // divider
    g.append("line")
      .attr("x1", x + 8).attr("y1", cy + 6)
      .attr("x2", x + nodeW - 8).attr("y2", cy + 6)
      .attr("stroke", pal.stroke).attr("stroke-width", "0.4").attr("opacity", "0.3")

    // label
    g.append("text")
      .attr("x", cx).attr("y", cy - 14)
      .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
      .attr("font-size", "11px").attr("font-weight", "600")
      .attr("font-family", "monospace").attr("fill", pal.text)
      .text(node.label)

    // sub
    g.append("text")
      .attr("x", cx).attr("y", cy + 1)
      .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
      .attr("font-size", "9.5px").attr("font-family", "monospace")
      .attr("fill", pal.sub)
      .text(node.sub)

    // detail
    g.append("text")
      .attr("x", cx).attr("y", cy + 17)
      .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
      .attr("font-size", "9px").attr("font-family", "monospace")
      .attr("fill", pal.detail)
      .text(node.detail)

    return cy
  }

  // ── helper: vertical connector ────────────────────────────────
  const vArrow = (cx, y1, y2, color) => {
    svg.append("line")
      .attr("x1", cx).attr("y1", y1 + nodeH / 2 + 2)
      .attr("x2", cx).attr("y2", y2 - nodeH / 2 - 4)
      .attr("stroke", color || "#3a3a38")
      .attr("stroke-width", "1").attr("marker-end", "url(#tr_arr)")
  }

  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // SECTION LABELS
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  const encCX = encX + nodeW / 2
  const decCX = decX + nodeW / 2

  svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", encCX).attr("y", startY - 16)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("font-size", "12px")
    .attr("font-family", "monospace").attr("fill", "#85b7eb").attr("font-weight", "600")
    .text("Encoder × 6")

  svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", decCX).attr("y", startY - 16)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("font-size", "12px")
    .attr("font-family", "monospace").attr("fill", "#7f77dd").attr("font-weight", "600")
    .text("Decoder × 6")

  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // ENCODER STACK
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  const encPositions = []
  transformer_spec.encoder_blocks.forEach((block, i) => {
    const cy = startY + i * (nodeH + gapY) + nodeH / 2
    encPositions.push(cy)
    drawBlock(encCX, cy, block)
    if (i > 0) vArrow(encCX, encPositions[i - 1], cy)
  })

  // encoder output label
  const encLastY = encPositions[encPositions.length - 1]
  svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", encCX).attr("y", encLastY + nodeH / 2 + 18)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("font-size", "10px")
    .attr("font-family", "monospace").attr("fill", "#555450")
    .text("memory K, V")

  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // DECODER STACK
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  const decPositions = []
  transformer_spec.decoder_blocks.forEach((block, i) => {
    const cy = startY + i * (nodeH + gapY) + nodeH / 2
    decPositions.push(cy)
    drawBlock(decCX, cy, block)
    if (i > 0) vArrow(decCX, decPositions[i - 1], cy)
  })

  // ── cross attention arrow from encoder to decoder ─────────────
  const crossIdx  = transformer_spec.decoder_blocks.findIndex(b => b.type === "cross")
  const crossDecY = decPositions[crossIdx]

  svg.append("path")
    .attr("d", `M${encCX + nodeW / 2} ${encLastY} C${encCX + 120} ${encLastY},${decCX - 120} ${crossDecY},${decCX - nodeW / 2} ${crossDecY}`)
    .attr("fill", "none").attr("stroke", "#7f77dd")
    .attr("stroke-width", "1").attr("stroke-dasharray", "4 3")
    .attr("opacity", "0.6").attr("marker-end", "url(#tr_arr)")

  svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", (encCX + decCX) / 2).attr("y", (encLastY + crossDecY) / 2 - 10)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("font-size", "10px")
    .attr("font-family", "monospace").attr("fill", "#7f77dd").attr("opacity", "0.8")
    .text("K, V")

  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // DIVIDER
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  const divY = startY + transformer_spec.decoder_blocks.length * (nodeH + gapY) + 30
  svg.append("line")
    .attr("x1", 40).attr("y1", divY)
    .attr("x2", W - 40).attr("y2", divY)
    .attr("stroke", "#333330").attr("stroke-width", "0.5")
    .attr("stroke-dasharray", "4 4")

  svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", W / 2).attr("y", divY + 16)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("font-size", "11px")
    .attr("font-family", "monospace").attr("fill", "#555450")
    .text("attention mechanism")

  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // ATTENTION DETAIL
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  const attnY    = divY + 46
  const attnGapX = 110
  const attnSteps = transformer_spec.attention.steps
  const attnTotalW = attnSteps.length * 80 + (attnSteps.length - 1) * (attnGapX - 80)
  const attnStartX = (W - (attnSteps.length - 1) * attnGapX) / 2
  const attnNodeW  = 88
  const attnNodeH  = 58

  attnSteps.forEach((step, i) => {
    const cx  = attnStartX + i * attnGapX
    const pal = transformer_COLORS[step.type] || transformer_COLORS.ffn
    const x   = cx - attnNodeW / 2
    const y   = attnY

    // glow
    svg.append("rect")
      .attr("x", x - 2).attr("y", y - 2)
      .attr("width", attnNodeW + 4).attr("height", attnNodeH + 4)
      .attr("rx", 10).attr("fill", "none")
      .attr("stroke", pal.stroke).attr("stroke-width", "0.5").attr("opacity", "0.2")

    // block
    svg.append("rect")
      .attr("x", x).attr("y", y)
      .attr("width", attnNodeW).attr("height", attnNodeH)
      .attr("rx", 8).attr("fill", pal.fill)
      .attr("stroke", pal.stroke).attr("stroke-width", "1.2")

    svg.append("line")
      .attr("x1", x + 6).attr("y1", y + attnNodeH / 2 + 6)
      .attr("x2", x + attnNodeW - 6).attr("y2", y + attnNodeH / 2 + 6)
      .attr("stroke", pal.stroke).attr("stroke-width", "0.4").attr("opacity", "0.3")

    svg.append("text")
      .attr("x", cx).attr("y", y + attnNodeH / 2 - 10)
      .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
      .attr("font-size", "12px").attr("font-weight", "600")
      .attr("font-family", "monospace").attr("fill", pal.text)
      .text(step.label)

    svg.append("text")
      .attr("x", cx).attr("y", y + attnNodeH / 2 + 14)
      .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
      .attr("font-size", "9.5px").attr("font-family", "monospace")
      .attr("fill", pal.sub)
      .text(step.sub)

    // connector to next
    if (i < attnSteps.length - 1) {
      svg.append("line")
        .attr("x1", cx + attnNodeW / 2 + 2)
        .attr("y1", y + attnNodeH / 2)
        .attr("x2", attnStartX + (i + 1) * attnGapX - attnNodeW / 2 - 4)
        .attr("y2", y + attnNodeH / 2)
        .attr("stroke", "#3a3a38").attr("stroke-width", "1")
        .attr("marker-end", "url(#tr_arr)")
    }
  })

  // equation
  svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", W / 2).attr("y", H - 12)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("font-size", "11px")
    .attr("font-family", "monospace").attr("fill", "#555450")
    .text(transformer_spec.attention.equation)

  // model params summary
  const m = transformer_spec.model
  svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", W / 2).attr("y", H - 28)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("font-size", "10px")
    .attr("font-family", "monospace").attr("fill", "#444440")
    .text(`d_model=${m.d_model}  heads=${m.n_heads}  d_ff=${m.d_ff}  layers=${m.n_layers}  dropout=${m.dropout}`)

  return svg.node()
}
```



### Vision Transformer (ViT)

Applies the Transformer directly to image patches; competes with CNNs on vision benchmarks.


## Generative Architectures

### Autoencoder (AE) / Variational Autoencoder (VAE)

Encoder-decoder bottleneck for compression and generation; VAE adds a probabilistic latent space.

### Generative Adversarial Network (GAN)

Generator vs. discriminator adversarial training; powerful for image synthesis.

### Diffusion Model

Learns to reverse a noise process; current state-of-the-art for image/audio generation (DDPM, Stable Diffusion).

### Flow-Based Model (Normalizing Flows)

Learns an invertible mapping between data and a simple distribution; exact likelihood estimation.


## Structural Patterns

### Encoder–Decoder (Seq2Seq)

Maps an input sequence to a latent representation and decodes to an output sequence; key in translation and segmentation (U-Net).

### Residual / Skip Connections

Adds the input directly to the output of a block, enabling very deep networks (ResNet). Now nearly universal.

### Dense Connections (DenseNet)

Each layer receives feature maps from all preceding layers; maximizes feature reuse.

### Graph Neural Network (GNN)

Operates on graph-structured data by aggregating neighbor features; used in molecular modeling, social networks.

## Hybrid & Modern Patterns

### State Space Model (SSM) / Mamba

Linear-time sequence modeling alternative to Transformers; strong on very long sequences.

### Mixture of Experts (MoE)

Routes inputs to specialized sub-networks; scales model capacity without proportional compute cost (used in GPT-4, Gemini).

### Capsule Network

Groups neurons into "capsules" that encode pose/spatial relationships; more structured than CNNs but less widely adopted.


## Training / Design Meta-Patterns

### Siamese / Contrastive Networks

Two or more weight-sharing branches trained on similarity; backbone of self-supervised learning (SimCLR, CLIP).

### Neural Architecture Search (NAS)

Automates the design of architectures; led to EfficientNet and MobileNet families.
